items.info: Himeko - Nova 's banner is the next banner that will be released in Phase 1 of Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.4 and her banner will run for the whole version . Sparxie , , and Evernight will have their reruns through the Indelible Coterie banner during Phase 1.

items.info: Himeko - Nova's banner will run from July 14, 2026 (UTC-5) until August 25, 2026 (Sever Time) . Her Light Cone, A Star That Lights the Night , will be available at the same time through the banner.
